name: Charthouse Bleu Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream, mustard, black pepper, salt, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Blend for 2 minutes at low speed.
3. Add mayonnaise and blend for an additional 30 seconds at low speed, then 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Crumble the Danish bleu cheese by hand and fold it into the mixture.
5. Blend until well combined, no more than 4 minutes at low speed.
6. Refrigerate for at least 24 hours before using.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups
